title: CFTR / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs77409459 CT genotype (one copy of the CFTR T338I variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information indicates use of ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of T338I. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to ivacaftor.
